title: Cuba: US military action would lead to a ‘bloodbath’
summary_full: Cuban President Miguel Diaz-Canel has issued a stark warning about the potential fallout from U.S. military actions, predicting a 'bloodbath' and significant turmoil across the region. He emphasized that Cuba is not a threat to its neighbors. This statement arises in light of rumors surrounding Cuba’s supposed procurement of over 300 military drones, coupled with plans to attack U.S. interests.
